goal.value: Build new file management features in the web UI: create new files, save changes (new blob), download (raw/ProseMirror JSON/original), archive original blob hash under dated name on save.

progress.value:
✅ Feature architecture planned
✅ Backend: POST /api/save (PM doc→blob, archive original, update tag)
✅ Backend: POST /api/new (create empty file by mode)
✅ Backend: POST /api/download (raw + json formats)
✅ Frontend: Save button + Ctrl+S, createFile, downloadFile
✅ Templates: Editor header w/ save+download, file list w/ new file form
✅ Both build variants compile cleanly
✅ `just check` passed: fmt✅ clippy✅ 289 unit tests✅ 51/54 integration tests (3 pre-existing network failures)

Ready for commit when user requests it.

Working in worktree: /home/user/.local/share/opencode/worktree/code/new-file-and-save/pkgs/id
Branch: new-file-and-save

Key files:
- src/web/routes.rs - Axum HTTP routes (GET only currently)
- src/web/templates.rs - HTML template rendering
- src/web/mod.rs - AppState(store, collab, assets), web_router()
- src/web/collab.rs - WebSocket collab protocol
- src/web/markdown.rs - ProseMirror↔Markdown conversion
- src/web/content_mode.rs - ContentMode enum, detect_mode()
- web/src/editor.ts - ProseMirror editor init, getEditorState()
- web/src/collab.ts - WebSocket collab client
- web/src/main.ts - App init, HTMX, nav, scroll

Blob store API: store.blobs().add_bytes(bytes), store.tags().set(name,hash), store.blobs().get_bytes(hash), store.tags().list()
Tags = name→hash mapping. Names are strings.
